The scene clearly represents roque nublo — öns ikon (lätt–medel) with realistisk ömiljö, kanarisk arkitektur, kust eller berg, människor i rörelse och tydliga reseguide-detaljer. Include natural human activity, realistic parked rental cars or traffic where appropriate, and boats only if the location is near the harbour or coast. Fresh spring Mediterranean daylight, natural shadows, true-to-life colors, detailed shadows, realistic scale, documentary travel photography style. No readable text, no fake signs, no logos, no watermark. Make it feel like a believable editorial travel photograph, not a glossy ad. Keep architecture, geography, light, people, traffic, and scale realistic for Gran Canaria.
